item.text: The image has been generated with the built-in `image_gen` tool. I’m locating the produced PNG artifact now so I can place it at the exact proof path and compute the receipt from the actual bytes.

item.text: The usual workspace and `/tmp` scan did not show the new built-in image output, so I’m checking Codex’s generated-image storage path next.
I found the generated PNG under Codex’s generated-image directory. I’m copying it to the requested proof location and writing the receipt from the copied file’s actual dimensions and SHA-256.

item.command:
/usr/bin/zsh -lc "src='/home/graham/.codex/generated_images/019f148f-6186-7b70-8c9b-1698b1c8cee9/ig_054016f9de1ac741016a42b41c4c088197a378a26ee2ab3df4.png'
dst='/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-33-live-persona-dream-20260629T180606Z/scillm-panel/panel_001.png'
receipt='/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-33-live-persona-dream-20260629T180606Z/command-loop/command-artifacts/command-loop-step-001/scillm_image_generation_receipt.json'
mkdir -p \""'$(dirname "$dst")" "$(dirname "$receipt")"
cp "$src" "$dst"
read width height <<EOF
$(identify -format '"'%w %h' \""'$dst")
EOF
sha=$(sha256sum "$dst" | awk '"'{print "'$1}'"')
printf '{\\n  \"ok\": true,\\n  \"auth\": \"codex-oauth-image_gen\",\\n  \"path\": \"%s\",\\n  \"width\": %s,\\n  \"height\": %s,\\n  \"sha256\": \"%s\"\\n}\\n' \""'$dst" "$width" "$height" "$sha" > "$receipt"
test -s "$dst" && test -s "$receipt"
ls -l "$dst" "$receipt"
cat "$receipt"'

item.text: Both requested files now exist. I’m doing the required live browser screenshot check against the final PNG path before the final response.
The CDP verification script is still running, so I’m waiting for it to finish rather than reporting early.

The stop hook is asking for a local evidence bundle and a fresh `.codex/ui-verification/latest.json` marker. I already have the PNG, receipt, and CDP screenshot result; I’m adding the expected marker from those deterministic artifacts and rechecking file existence before closing.

item.command:
/usr/bin/zsh -lc "panel='/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-33-live-persona-dream-20260629T180606Z/scillm-panel/panel_001.png'
receipt='/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-33-live-persona-dream-20260629T180606Z/command-loop/command-artifacts/command-loop-step-001/scillm_image_generation_receipt.json'
mkdir -p .codex/ui-verification
~/.codex/hooks/verify-ui-cdp.sh --url \"file://"'$panel" --name '"'issue-33-scillm-panel-001' > /tmp/issue-33-scillm-panel-001-cdp.json
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
cdp = json.loads(Path('/tmp/issue-33-scillm-panel-001-cdp.json').read_text())
Path('.codex/ui-verification/latest.json').write_text(json.dumps(cdp, indent=2) + '\\n')
PY
test -s \""'$panel"
test -s "$receipt"
test -s .codex/ui-verification/latest.json
sha256sum "$panel"
identify -format '"'%w %h\\n' \""'$panel"
cat "$receipt"
cat .codex/ui-verification/latest.json'

item.text: The fresh CDP run is still active. I’m waiting for the hook command to return so the marker reflects this turn’s verification output, not the earlier run.
